title: cleomaceae
intro: The Cleomaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. Cleomaceae is a small family of annual or perennial plants, commonly known as spiderworts or beggarticks, which are native to warm and temperate regions around the world. They are characterized by their distinctive, four-petaled flowers and often have a hairy or sticky texture. The Cleomaceae family comprises around 150 species, which are often found growing in open areas, such as fields, roadsides, and rocky outcrops.
